context: Tests whether the agent properly designs a minimal, isolated test stack with parameterization and defines observable success criteria for validation.

checklist.name: Context parameterization
checklist.description: memory-test-stack.ts uses this.node.tryGetContext() or similar to drive the memory configuration

checklist.name: Minimal resources
checklist.description: memory-test-stack.ts contains only Lambda function and essential dependencies (IAM role), no unrelated resources like S3 buckets, DynamoDB tables, or API Gateway

checklist.name: Single property focus
checklist.description: The stack is designed to isolate testing the memory property specifically, not multiple Lambda properties

checklist.name: Observable criteria defined
checklist.description: test-execution-plan.md defines specific CloudFormation events to look for (e.g., DELETE + CREATE for replacement)

checklist.name: Success criteria explicit
checklist.description: test-execution-plan.md explicitly states what outcomes indicate replacement vs in-place update

checklist.name: Verification method
checklist.description: test-execution-plan.md describes how to verify results (e.g., checking function ARN, inspecting CFN events)

checklist.name: Valid CDK syntax
checklist.description: memory-test-stack.ts uses valid CDK v2 syntax (imports from 'aws-cdk-lib', extends cdk.Stack)
